bank.retain_mission: Extract paid-media campaign structures, creative tests, audience and keyword decisions, bidding strategies, attribution/tracking setups, and performance outcomes (CPA, ROAS, CTR, frequency) across PPC, paid social, programmatic, and search.
bank.observations_mission: Observations are stable facts about accounts, KPIs, target audiences, brand guardrails, attribution model, tracking stack, and creative principles that consistently work or fail. Ignore daily metric noise and one-off A/B variants.

mental_models.name: Account Structure
mental_models.source_query: How are paid-media accounts and campaigns organized? Channels, audiences, creative themes, attribution model, and tracking setup.

mental_models.name: Performance Patterns
mental_models.source_query: What creative, audience, and bidding patterns drive performance? Include winning/losing tests with numbers (CPA, ROAS, CTR) and any seasonality.
